name: smartbdu-backend
description: SmartBDU - Smart Campus Web Application Backend

scripts.setup: echo 'Setting up SmartBDU...' && mkdir -p data/db && echo 'MongoDB data directory created' && echo 'Please start MongoDB manually: mongod --dbpath ./data/db' && echo 'Then run: npm run seed'
scripts.start:all: echo 'Starting SmartBDU...' && echo 'Make sure MongoDB is running first!' && npm run start
